title: Ryan Huang Receives NSERC Doctoral Award
content: Congratulations to PhD student Ryan Huang for receiving the prestigious NSERC doctoral award (PGS-D) for 2026–2029, as well as the Faculty of Medicine Graduate Fellowship.

title: Mackey-Glass & CAMBAM Student Awards
content: Congratulations to Adrian Yehia for receiving the Mackey-Glass Undergraduate Award (2026), and to Yifan Zhao for receiving the CAMBAM Undergraduate Fellowship (2026).

title: Jonas Lehnert and Amin Akhshi Defend PhDs
content: A big congratulations to Jonas Lehnert and Amin Akhshi for successfully defending their Ph.D. theses! Jonas is joining the University of Ottawa and Amin is joining the University of Calgary for their postdoctoral fellowships.

title: Undergraduate Summer Research Awards
content: Congratulations to Yifan Zhao for winning the Mackey-Glass Undergraduate Award, and to Maeve Albert for receiving the Institut des sciences mathématiques Undergraduate Summer Research Award for 2025.

title: Xinyue Ma Wins Open Science Prize
content: Congratulations to PhD student Xinyue Ma for receiving the Trainee Professional Development Award from the Society for Neuroscience (SfN) and the Neuro-Irv & Helga Cooper Foundation Open Science Prize.

title: Dr. Niklas Brake Defends PhD & Wins Postdoc Fellowship
content: Congratulations to Niklas Brake for defending his Ph.D. thesis! Niklas was also awarded the Canada Brain Star Award and an NSERC Postdoctoral Fellowship for 2025.
